code:
import io
import string

match io.read_line()
when Some(line)
  mut out = ""
  mut tok = ""
  mut first = true
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(line)
  while i <= n
    mut is_ws = true
    if i == n
      is_ws = true
    else
      let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        0
      end
      is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
    end
    if is_ws
      if not string.is_empty(tok)
        if first
          out = "#{tok} #{tok}"
          first = false
        else
          out = "#{out} #{tok} #{tok}"
        end
        tok = ""
      end
    else
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        tok = "#{tok}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(out)
when None
  println("")
end
